sections.paragraph:
Ἀβιά, ὁ indecl. (אֲבִיָּה) Abijah, B-D-F §3

① Son of Rehoboam (1 Ch 3:10), an ancestor of Jesus Mt 1:7ab.

② Founder of the class of priests to which Zacharias belonged (1 Ch 24:10; 2 Esdr 22:16f; the name Zacharias occurs in the latter pass.) Lk 1:5. S. ἐφημερία, Ζαχαρίας.

indecl. indecl. = indeclinable

B-D-F B-D-F = FBlass, ADebrunner, RFunk, A Greek Grammar of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature—List 6

pass. pass. = passive (either of grammatical form or of passive experience); also used in reference to literary portion=passage

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 2
